results.title: HMD Skyline 2: New leak reveals better cameras and a more powerful processor
results.description: The HMD Skyline 2 is still expected to arrive this year, although there has been no official confirmation yet. However, a new leak has surfaced revealing the smartphone will launch with better specs than earlier reports stated.

results.title: Tesla vs BYD: Two Paths to EV Leadership, One Winner
results.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and BYD (OTC:BYDDF) sit at opposite poles of the electric vehicle world. Tesla just posted a sharp Q1 margin rebound while pouring cash into robotics and autonomy. BYD, the world’s largest new energy vehicle maker by volume, keeps flooding global markets with affordable EVs and plug-in hybrids. The businesses barely resemble each other ... Tesla vs BYD: Two Paths to EV Leadership, One Winner
